description: Known Java-vs-.NET runtime parity divergences. Entries are matched by operation and optional file, fileGlob, category, or categoryGlob.

entries.expiresWhen: Issue #441 reaches zero-known runtime parity for text extraction.
entries.ratchet: The total known text rows must trend down and must not exceed the checked-in ratchet baseline.
entries.reason: Default PDFTextStripper semantic output still differs from Java for many successful text extraction cases.

entries.expiresWhen: Issue #489 closes all form and widget appearance render rows.
entries.ratchet: Known rows covered by this entry must not increase; remove file names as form/widget render parity improves.
entries.reason: Widget appearance generation, multiline layout, auto font sizing, inherited default appearance resources, and widget rotation still differ from Java for these render fixtures.

entries.expiresWhen: Issue #493 closes all pattern, shading, transparency group, and form XObject render rows.
entries.ratchet: Known rows covered by this entry must not increase; remove file names as pattern/shading/transparency render parity improves.
entries.reason: Shading BBox intersection, tiling pattern matrix handling, transparency group rasterization/compositing, blend modes, soft masks, and form XObject rendering still differ from Java for these render fixtures.

entries.expiresWhen: The hosted-only PDFBOX-5920 render row is assigned to one of the specific implementation buckets or fixed.
entries.ratchet: This entry must account for at most one hosted-only detail-mismatch row under the ratchet baseline; remove it after the variance is assigned or fixed.
entries.reason: Local runtime parity reports this row as equivalent, while hosted CI reports it as a render detail mismatch. The dedicated entry documents the 51-vs-52 variance without preserving a broad render-quality catch-all.
